# SoundX Plan 6: Preset System + Python Factory

> Executed inline by the authoring session.

**Goal:** Factory presets generated by the Python factory pipeline, embedded into the plugin, selectable from a preset browser in the editor, plus one-click user preset saving. Every factory preset is render-validated in CI.

## Design
- **Format:** APVTS state XML (`<PARAMS><PARAM id value/>...</PARAMS>`), extension `.soundxpreset`. The Python generator emits ALL parameters per preset (defaults + overrides) so loads are deterministic.
- **Factory pipeline:** `factory/generate_presets.py` (runs under the existing uv venv) writes `presets/factory/*.soundxpreset`; `factory/test_generate_presets.py` (pytest) validates well-formedness, full param coverage, and value ranges. Generated files are committed (the plugin embeds them at build time via `juce_add_binary_data`).
- **Plugin:** `PresetManager` lists factory (BinaryData) + user presets (`Documents/SoundX/Presets`), applies via `replaceState`. Editor: preset combo + SAVE button (writes a timestamped user preset).
- **Validation:** C++ render test iterates every embedded factory preset: load → render note → finite output. pluginval 10.
- Factory presets use wavetable modes (the factory bank); three are param-templates labeled "(drop sample)" for granular/spectral use.

## Tasks
1. Python generator + pytest + generated bank (committed).
2. CMake embed + PresetManager + editor browser/save.
3. Factory-preset render test; pluginval; README; merge; push.
